steps.title: Use the second equation
steps.content:
At the intersection, $x=5$ satisfies both equations. Substitute $x=5$ into the second equation:
$$8(5)+2by=80$$
$$40+2by=80$$
$$by=20$$

steps.title: Substitute into the first equation
steps.content:
Use $x=5$ and $by=20$ in the first equation:
$$a(5)+by=70$$
$$5a+20=70$$
$$a=10$$
The answer is D.
